title: Exotic Moroccan Chicken Khlea
description: A citrusy and creamy Moroccan dish featuring ginger, perfect for a sick day, made with paleo-friendly ingredients in a traditional tandoor clay pot, served in the form of khlea.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor clay pot by boiling water in it for 10 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, grated ginger, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken breast to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and place it in the preheated tandoor clay pot.
Pour the chicken broth and coconut cream into the pot, making sure the chicken is covered.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 25 minutes.
Check the chicken for doneness and cook for an additional 10 minutes if necessary.
Serve the chicken khlea hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
